title: Resource Farms
description: Speeds up the production of resources.
body:
### **THESE UPDATES ONLY APPLY TO THE 1.21.1 VERSION. I AM ACTIVELY WORKING ON V2.0.0 FOR 1.21.3/.4 BUT MOJANG HAS MADE IT VERY CHALLENGING TO DATA GENERATE. BECAUSE OF THIS, IT WILL MOST LIKELY BE SEVERAL MONTHS UNTIL I AM ABLE TO RELEASE AN UPDATE FOR 1.21.3. DO NOT COMPLAIN THAT STUFF ISN'T WORKING FOR 1.21.3 IF YOU HAVE NOT READ THIS! **

Similar to my Mob Farm and Plant Farm, this helps speed up the production of resources.

- The recipes are very similar to the other farms. 
  -ALL farms have a tool on it.
  -The heigher the tier, the faster the drop rate.
  -Normal in-game tool requirements still apply. You can't make a diamond farm with a wooden pickaxe.  
  - Blocks that require a pickaxe, have a pickaxe


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0240f58eb2d1d7fa64468d09d5ad9d61033ef3da.png)

  - Blocks that require a shovel, have a shovel

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7093ac800b41faedaa09a852f404de69383c1aea.png)

  
    - You CAN use tools from other mods, but be warned, while the crafting recipe will work, the rate will default to the wooden rate.
  
- Using four materials of your choice, you can upgrade the pickaxe or shovel within the block.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ba75fc3326ff88b7a7f53104eda8f3b0f149dd9.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/420c868cf48220d2b6004735ce5cf922f7600069.png)


- You can add enchantmnets to the tool on the block by combing an enchanted book normally compatible with the tool in the crafting grid.
 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65ec7749d9bce23550b90132b040d1ba3a174640.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b99b65eb1a8e6fbd40fd885050acfde548acf6a9.png)
 
  - Silk touch will cause the block to drop itself
  - Efficiency will increase the drop rate.
  - Fortune on pickaxes will cause blocks to drop more resources
  - For now, unbreaking does nothing, later on, I might make durability be a thing. I don't know.
    - You can NOT combine multiple enchantments by putting multiple enchanted books in the crafting grid.


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad9c526727744ddd6cf3166fc9b3f058f32e1b1a.png)




    - You can, however, combine multiple enchantments onto one book, then combine that with the farm block in the crafting grid

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a93fc064dcc22d65444ec566b12cc140c7295b75.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0d4d6e848a65a8952ce1ce9d15fd282c3ae3d27.png)

- Putting a farm with enchantments with nothing else will remove ALL enchantments
  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2687544346ca6ea22e4b12df3b48d0366b031ad4.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f66921959e103e2789d46e5e4551ea505bb4ae14.png)
  
  
- Join my Discord server to get early access to my mods before they are released anywhere else, as well as have the ability to help me develop new mods: https://discord.gg/XCrMsrXC3a
